name: Cloudflare
summary: Manage Cloudflare (Workers, DNS, KV/R2, analytics) -- this project ships on CF.
description: Query + manage Cloudflare resources (Workers, DNS, KV/R2, Pages, analytics). ClaudeFather/text2tune already deploys on Cloudflare, so an agent that checks Worker status, reads analytics, and inspects config closes the deploy + ops loop. Uses Cloudflare's official MCP server (URL + OAuth).

requires.label: A Cloudflare account + OAuth (account + zone access)
